hero.name: Muhammad Fadhil Hani
hero.title: Informatics Engineering Graduate
hero.subtitle: BNSP Certified | Web Developer & IT Enthusiast
hero.summary: Bachelor graduate in Informatics Engineering Education with BNSP certifications in Program Analysis and Computer Network Engineering. Experienced in building responsive web interfaces, browser-based information systems, and applying structured programming principles and software development best practices.

about.interestValue: Web Development, UI Implementation, Structured Programming, Network Infrastructure
about.bio: I am a fresh graduate in Informatics Engineering who has built practical experience through the Kemnaker internship program and industry internship. Comfortable working with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React.js, and Next.js to build functional and well-structured web interfaces. Holding BNSP certifications in Program Analysis and Junior Network Administration.

items.company: Lembaga Pemasyarakatan Kelas IIB Nunukan (Kemnaker Program)
items.description: Participated in the Ministry of Manpower of the Republic of Indonesia's internship program for university graduates, serving in a Public Facility Management role. During the internship, developed a web-based correspondence information system that was directly utilized by the agency.
responsibilities: Designed and implemented the user interface for a web-based correspondence management system
Wrote HTML, CSS, and JavaScript code following coding guidelines and best practices
Organized programming functions and files in a clean, well-documented folder structure
Integrated pre-existing libraries for PDF and Excel export features
Implemented structured programming logic: branching, loops, functions, and letter data array management
Built JSON-based data backup and restore functionality
Performed debugging and functional testing of the application in a browser environment

items.description: Developed responsive web dashboards and ensured system stability and backend integration.
responsibilities: Built responsive UI components using React.js
Performed debugging and web application performance optimization
Collaborated with backend team to ensure data consistency

items.title: Web Correspondence System – Lapas Kelas IIB Nunukan
items.description: A browser-based correspondence management system built during the Kemnaker internship program at Lapas Nunukan. Manages automatic outgoing letter numbering based on classification codes, with letter archiving, PDF and Excel export, and JSON-based backup/restore. Runs entirely in the browser with no backend server.

items.title: Responsive Web Dashboard
items.description: Interactive web dashboard with real-time data visualization, user management, and backend API integration built during internship at PT Digikreatif Teknologi Indonesia.

contact.closing: Open to opportunities in Web Development and Information Technology.
